items.headline_ai: Kayne Anderson BDC closes $200M private placement of senior unsecured notes in three tranches
items.snippet: KBDC closes $200M private placement: $40M SOFR+2.32% Series C due 2028, $60M 5.80% Series D due 2028, $100M 6.15% Series E due 2030.

items.headline_ai: Kayne Anderson BDC extends credit facility to 2029, cuts rate from 2.35% to 2.10%
items.snippet: KBDC amends its $400M revolving credit facility, extending maturity to November 2029 and reducing SOFR spread from 2.35% to 2.10%.
